---
title: "audit_skills.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\scripts\audit_skills.py"
loc: 34
complexity: 8
logic_score: 7.60
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 6.11
overall_score: 4.35
---

## Intent
The `audit_skills.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on audit_manor_skills. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via audit_manor_skills. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `audit_manor_skills`
